summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StackPilot monetization features. Fixed critical React import issue. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI working correctly, user authentication and subscription tiers operational.
passed_tests: API /api/tiers returns correct tier configuration (Free $0, Pro $12, Team $29)
API /api/users POST creates new user with default free subscription
API /api/users/{id} and /api/users/email/{email} return user with tierLimits
Pricing page displays all 3 tiers correctly with proper pricing
Login dialog works - email authentication creates/gets user
User subscription tier badge shows 'Free' in header after login
Usage card shows project count (0/3) and tier (Free Plan)
Upgrade button appears in usage card for free users
Free tier project creation works with Gemini AI provider
AI provider restrictions enforced - GPT-5.2 and Claude blocked for free users
Export restrictions enforced - canExport returns false for free users
Project creation respects user's project limit (3 for free tier)
Stripe checkout flow buttons present and functional on pricing page
Logout button works and clears user state correctly
User state management with localStorage working properly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All UI elements and monetization features functional
success_percentage.integration: 95% - User authentication, feature gating, and upgrade flows working
